primary_function: "Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation."

authoritative: Document conversion (.doc to .docx, DOCX to PDF/images)
Table creation and configuration in DOCX
List formatting and numbering in documents
out_of_scope: RTF or other document format handling

suggested_aec_gates: Verify output uses docx-js library correctly for document generation
Confirm page size is explicitly set (not defaulting to A4) when creating documents
Ensure tables include both columnWidths and individual cell widths
Validate that lists use LevelFormat configuration instead of unicode bullet characters
Check that ShadingType.CLEAR is used instead of ShadingType.SOLID for table backgrounds
Confirm WidthType.DXA is used instead of WidthType.PERCENTAGE for table widths
Verify PageBreak elements are wrapped inside Paragraph elements
Ensure images include required type parameter and altText properties
Validate that output stays within DOCX manipulation domain boundaries
trigger_text: "Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files).
